zh.lifeSummary: Lady Catherine de Windsor於1420年出生在愛爾蘭萊音斯特。她和George Nanton至少有1個兒子。她去世於1500年在英國素福爾可享年80歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Lady Catherine de Windsor于1420年出生在爱尔兰萊音斯特。她和George Nanton至少有1个儿子。她去世于1500年在英国素福爾可享年80岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.
Indian: variant of   Dey  .

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Windsor
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English:

habitational name from Windsor (Berkshire), Windsor in Stratford upon Avon (Warwickshire), Winsor in Copythorne (Hampshire), Winsor in Yealmpton (Devon), or Broadwindsor and Little Windsor (Dorset). All these places have the same linguistic origin, whose meaning is controversial, but seems to be ‘windlass bank’ (Old English windels + ōra).

in Yorkshire perhaps a habitational name from Winds Over in Middleton (near Ilkley, Yorkshire). The placename probably derives from Old English wind ‘wind’ (genitive windes) + ofer ‘slope, hill, ridge’.

variants.name: Winzer
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Gerhard, Ilse, Ingo, Wilhelm.
German: occupational name for a vine-grower or vintner, Middle High German winzer.
German: habitational name from any of various places so named in Bavaria.

variants.name: Winsor
meanings: English: variant of   Windsor  . This is the spelling used for places so named in Devon and Hampshire.
Perhaps also an Americanized form of German   Winzer  .

nameMeanings.name: Lady
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: from Middle English lavedi, levedi, ladi ‘lady, female head of a household, woman, wife’ (Old English hlǣfdige). As a man's name it may have been used in mockery, or be short for occupational names such as Ladyman.
Polish: variant of   Lada  .
Hungarian (Ládi): habitational name for someone from Lád in Borsod County or Lad in Somogy County.

variants.name: Lada
meanings: Of uncertain origin. If not simply an invention, it may have been devised as a feminine equivalent of   Alan   (of which it is an anagram), or a shortened form of   Alana .  It seems to have been first used by the American film actress  Lana Turner  (  1920–1995 ), whose original name was  Julia .

nameMeanings.name: Catherine
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Variant spelling of   Katherine .  This form of the name is also used in France.

variants.name: Catheryn
meanings: Variant spelling of   Katherine .  This form of the name is also used in France.

variants.name: Katherine
meanings: Greek: Same as Catherine.

variants.name: Catharin
meanings: Variant spelling of   Katherine .  This form of the name is also used in France.

variants.name: Cathrine
meanings: Variant spelling of   Katherine .  This form of the name is also used in France.

variants.name: Cathryn
meanings: Variant spelling of   Katherine .  This form of the name is also used in France.

variants.name: Cathrin
meanings: Variant spelling of   Katherine .  This form of the name is also used in France.

variants.name: Catharine
meanings: Greek: Pure.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: Lady Catherine de Windsor was born in 1420, in Leinster, Ireland. She had at least 1 son with George Nanton. She died in 1500, in Suffolk, England, at the age of 80.

fr.lifeSummary: Lady Catherine de Windsor est née en 1420, à Leinster, Irlande. Elle a eu au moins 1 fils avec George Nanton. Elle est décédée en 1500, à Suffolk, Angleterre, à l’âge de 80 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Lady Catherine de Windsor wurde 1420 in Leinster, Irland geboren. Sie hatte mit George Nanton mindestens 1 Sohn. Sie starb 1500 im Alter von 80 Jahren in Suffolk, England.

it.lifeSummary: Lady Catherine de Windsor è nata il nel 1420 nel Leinster, Irlanda. Lei avuto almeno 1 figlio con George Nanton. Morì nel 1500, nel Suffolk, England, all'età di 80 anni.

ja.Hertfordshire, England: イギリスハートフォードシュアイア
ja.Leinster, Ireland: アイルランドレインスター
ja.lifeSummary: Lady Catherine de Windsorは1420年にアイルランドレインスターで生まれた。彼女はGeorge Nantonとの間に少なくとも1人の息子をもうけた。彼女は1500年にイギリススフォルクで80歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Lady Catherine de Windsor(은)는 1420년 아일랜드 레인스터에서 태어났다. 그녀는 George Nanton(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1500년 영국 수폴크에서 80세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Lady Catherine de Windsor nasceu em 1420, em Leinster, Irlanda. Ela teve pelo menos 1 filho com George Nanton. Ela faleceu em 1500, em Suffolk, Inglaterra, com 80 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Lady Catherine de Windsor родилась в 1420 г. в местности линстир, Ирландия. У неё был по крайней мере 1 сын от George Nanton. Она умерла в 1500 г. в местности суффолк, Англия в возрасте 80 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Lady Catherine de Windsor nació en 1420, en Leinster, Irlanda. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo con George Nanton. Murió en 1500, en Suffolk, Inglaterra, a la edad de 80 años.
